title: briza rufa
intro: Briza rufa, also known as red quaking grass or red bunting, is a type of flowering grass native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Briza rufa include its potential to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Briza rufa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be dried and used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
